name: OpenAI o1
note: Full reasoning flagship (API snapshot o1-2024-12-17); added vision and function calling vs o1-preview; scheduled API shutdown 2026-10-23.

results.notes: AIME 2024 [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]

From OpenAI's own simple-evals benchmark-harness README table (o1 row).
MATH-500 (repo evaluates o-series models on MATH-500, not legacy MATH test set).
Relayed from OpenAI's o3/o4-mini launch comparison table showing o1's prior score on MathVista Visual Math Reasoning; o1 has vision capability (confirmed already true in corpus).
Relayed from the same o3-launch comparison table; CharXiv-Reasoning scientific-figure benchmark.

verificationNotes: Full o1 launch on 2024-12-05 (alongside o1-pro/ChatGPT Pro) confirmed via multiple independent sources (Wikipedia, InfoQ, OpenAI o1 system card PDF dated 2024-12-05). AIME 74.3, GPQA 78, SWE-bench 48.9, Codeforces 1891, MMMU 77.6 all confirmed by direct fetch of datacamp.com/blog/o3-openai, matching exactly. Scheduled shutdown 2026-10-23 confirmed via OpenAI deprecation coverage (TheRouter.ai, OpenAI community deprecation notice) - the model is still real/active as of today (2026-07-12). No changes made.
